name: actions-and-utilities
tagline: Reference for Phaser 4's Actions namespace and Array/Object/String utility functions for batch game-object operations.
verdict: Accurate, well-structured API reference with concrete signatures and runnable examples; no security issues found. Weak on hygiene: no negative-trigger guidance to prevent misfiring against sibling Phaser skills, and no version/changelog signal to track content changes.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion guidance anywhere, despite explicit related sibling skills (groups-and-containers, sprites-and-images) that could misfire.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes found anywhere in the file.
